name: @eigenpal/docx-template-skill
description: Agentic generation of .docx templates from examples using docxtemplater

scripts.bundle: bun build skills/docx-template/agent/analyze.ts --outfile skills/docx-template/agent/dist/analyze.js --target node && bun build skills/docx-template/agent/generate.ts --outfile skills/docx-template/agent/dist/generate.js --target node && bun build skills/docx-template/agent/refine.ts --outfile skills/docx-template/agent/dist/refine.js --target node
scripts.build: bun run typecheck && bun run bundle
